---
title: |
  Code Template
subtitle: |
  Untitled Project: A great project
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: true
  eval: true
  message: true
---

# Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup
# To track computation time
start_time <- Sys.time()

# set width of console output
options(width = 80)


# Install and load required packages
p_required <- c(
  "tidyverse",
  "here",
  "knitr",
  "sessioninfo"
)
packages <- rownames(installed.packages())
p_to_install <- p_required[!(p_required %in% packages)]
if (length(p_to_install) > 0) {
  install.packages(p_to_install)
}
sapply(p_required, require, character.only = TRUE)
rm(p_required, p_to_install, packages)
```

# Code 1

```{r}
#| label: import
#| cache: true
dependency <- read.csv(here::here(
  "data",
  "01_raw",
  "chokepoint_country_dependency.csv"
))
trade_2024 <- read.csv(here::here(
  "data",
  "01_raw",
  "BACI_trade_product_level",
  "BACI_HS92_Y2024_V202601.csv"
))
product <- read.csv(here::here(
  "data",
  "01_raw",
  "BACI_trade_product_level",
  "product_codes_HS92_V202601.csv"
))
country_codes <- read.csv(here::here(
  "data",
  "01_raw",
  "BACI_trade_product_level",
  "country_codes_V202601.csv"
))

country_codes_manual <- tibble(
  country_name = c("Taiwan", "Vietnam"),
  country_iso3 = c("TWN", "VNM")
)
country_codes <- country_codes %>%
  bind_rows(country_codes_manual)

country_codes %>%
  write.csv(here::here("data", "02_processed", "country_codes.csv"))

EI <- read.csv(
  here::here("data", "01_raw", "EI-Stats-2026.csv"),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
  skip = 2
)

Mil_firepower <- read.csv(here::here(
  "data",
  "01_raw",
  "global_military_firepower_2025.csv"
))

regimes <- read.csv(here::here(
  "data",
  "01_raw",
  "political-regimes.csv"
))
```

```{r}
#| label: filter-dependency
dependency <- dependency %>%
  filter(
    canal %in%
      c(
        "Malacca Strait",
        "Gibraltar Strait",
        "Suez Canal",
        "Strait of Hormuz",
        "Panama Canal",
        "Taiwan Strait"
      )
  ) %>%
  select(
    iso3,
    canal,
    q_sea_predict:share_q
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: join-BACI_2024
baci <- trade_2024 %>%
  left_join(country_codes, by = c("i" = "country_code")) %>%
  rename(
    "exporter_iso3" = "country_iso3",
    "exporter_name" = "country_name"
  ) %>%
  left_join(country_codes, by = c("j" = "country_code")) %>%
  rename(
    "importer_iso3" = "country_iso3",
    "importer_name" = "country_name"
  ) %>%
  select(
    k,
    v,
    q,
    exporter_iso3,
    importer_iso3,
    exporter_name,
    importer_name
  ) %>%
  rename(
    "product" = k,
    "value" = v,
    "quantity" = q
  )


oil_code <- 270900 #taken from the product code dataset
baci_oil <- baci %>% filter(product %in% oil_code)
baci_oil %>% write.csv(here::here("data", "02_processed", "oil_trade.csv"))
```


```{r}

names(EI) <- sub("^X", "", names(EI))
names(EI) <- sub("Million.tonnes", "country", names(EI))
names(EI)[is.na(names(EI)) | names(EI) == ""] <- "empty"

ei_clean <- EI %>%

  filter(!is.na(country), country != "") %>%

  filter(
    !country %in%
      c(
        "Africa",
        "Europe",
        "Asia",
        "North America",
        "South America",
        "Middle East",
        "Oceania"
      ),
    !grepl("Total", country, ignore.case = TRUE)
  )

year_cols <- as.character(1965:2025)

ei_clean <- ei_clean %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(year_cols), ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(.x))))

ei_clean <- ei_clean %>%
  filter(rowSums(!is.na(across(all_of(year_cols)))) > 0)


ei_long <- ei_clean %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = `1965`:`2025`,
    names_to = "year",
    values_to = "oil_tonnes"
  ) %>%
  mutate(year = as.integer(year)) %>%
  select(country, year, oil_tonnes)

ei_2024 <- ei_long %>%
  filter(year == 2024) %>%
  mutate(
    country = str_trim(country),
    country = str_replace_all(country, "T�rkiye", "TÃ¼rkiye"),
    country = str_replace_all(country, "South Korea", "Rep. of Korea"),
    country = str_replace_all(country, "US", "USA"),
    country = str_replace_all(
      country,
      "Trinidad & Tobago",
      "Trinidad and Tobago"
    )
  )

EI_ISO3 <- ei_2024 %>%
  left_join(country_codes, by = c("country" = "country_name")) %>%
  rename(importer_iso3 = country_iso3) %>%
  select(importer_iso3, oil_tonnes, country, year)

EI_ISO3 %>%
  write.csv(here::here(
    "data",
    "02_processed",
    "EI_2024_oil_consumption.csv"
  ))

rm(ei_2024, ei_clean, ei_long)
```


```{r}
EI_ISO3 <-
  read.csv(here::here(
    "data",
    "02_processed",
    "EI_2024_oil_consumption.csv"
  ))

oil_trade <- read.csv(here::here("data", "02_processed", "oil_trade.csv"))

oil_imports <- oil_trade %>%
  group_by(importer_iso3) %>%
  summarize(
    oil_v_total = sum(value, na.rm = TRUE),
    oil_q_total = sum(quantity, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

dep_country <- dependency %>%
  mutate(
    dep_share_sea = if_else(q_sea_predict > 0, q_canal / q_sea_predict, 0)
  )

dep_oil <- dep_country %>%
  rename(importer_iso3 = iso3) %>%
  left_join(oil_imports, by = "importer_iso3")

dep_oil <- dep_oil %>%
  mutate(
    oil_q_canal = dep_share_sea * oil_q_total,
    oil_v_canal = dep_share_sea * oil_v_total,
    dep_oil_share_q = if_else(
      oil_q_total > 0,
      oil_q_canal / oil_q_total,
      NA_real_
    ),
    dep_oil_share_v = if_else(
      oil_v_total > 0,
      oil_v_canal / oil_v_total,
      NA_real_
    )
  )

criticality <- EI_ISO3 %>%
  select(importer_iso3, oil_tonnes) %>%
  rename(criticality_oil_tonnes = oil_tonnes)

dep_oil_full <- dep_oil %>%
  left_join(criticality, by = "importer_iso3")

reroute <- tibble(
  canal = c(
    # no rerouting
    "Strait of Hormuz",
    "Bosporus Straits",
    # long rerouting
    "Bab el-Mandeb",
    "Gibraltar Strait",
    "Suez Canal",
    "Panama Canal",
    # short_rerouting
    "Malacca Strait",
    "Taiwan Strait"
  ),
  rerouting_share = c(
    # no rerouting
    0,
    0,
    # long rerouting
    0.4,
    0.4,
    0.4,
    0.4,
    # short rerouting
    0.8,
    0.8
  )
)
dep_oil_full <- dep_oil_full %>%
  left_join(reroute, by = "canal")

stakes <- dep_oil_full %>%
  mutate(
    Stakes_ic = dep_oil_share_q *
      criticality_oil_tonnes *
      (1 - rerouting_share)
  )

# if necessary, aggregate to each country
stakes_country <- stakes %>%
  group_by(importer_iso3) %>%
  summarise(Stakes_i = sum(Stakes_ic, na.rm = TRUE))

stakes %>% write.csv(here::here("data", "03_final", "Stakes.csv"))
```



```{r}
naval_power <- Mil_firepower %>%
  select(country, total_naval_fleet) %>%
  mutate(
    country = str_trim(country),
    country = str_replace_all(country, " and ", " & "),
    country = str_replace_all(country, "Turkiye", "TÃ¼rkiye"),
    country = str_replace_all(country, "South Korea", "Rep. of Korea"),
    country = str_replace_all(country, "United States", "USA"),
    country = str_replace_all(country, "Russia", "Russian Federation")
  ) %>%
  rename(country_name = country)

naval_power_iso <- naval_power %>%
  left_join(country_codes, by = "country_name")

naval_power_iso <- naval_power_iso %>%
  mutate(
    total_naval_fleet = if_else(is.na(total_naval_fleet), 0, total_naval_fleet),
    naval_norm = (total_naval_fleet - min(total_naval_fleet, na.rm = TRUE)) /
      (max(total_naval_fleet, na.rm = TRUE) -
        min(total_naval_fleet, na.rm = TRUE))
  )

naval_power_iso <- naval_power_iso %>%
  select(country_iso3, total_naval_fleet, naval_norm) %>%
  rename(importer_iso3 = country_iso3)

ability_power <- tibble(
  importer_iso3 = c(
    "USA",
    "GBR",
    "FRA",
    "DEU",
    "CHN",
    "JPN",
    "IND",
    "RUS",
    "BRA",
    "SAU",
    "IRN"
  ),
  power_cat = c(
    "global",
    "global",
    "global",
    "global",
    "global",
    "regional",
    "regional",
    "global",
    "regional",
    "regional",
    "regional"
  )
) %>%
  mutate(
    power_score = case_when(
      power_cat == "global" ~ 1.0,
      power_cat == "regional" ~ 0.6,
      TRUE ~ 0.3
    )
  )

proximity <- tibble(
  importer_iso3 = c("EGY", "IRN", "OMN", "TUR", "PAN"),
  canal = c(
    "Suez Canal",
    "Strait of Hormuz",
    "Strait of Hormuz",
    "Turkish Straits",
    "Panama Canal"
  ),
  proximity_score = 1.0 # full control/bordering
)

regime_2024 <- regimes %>%
  filter(Year == 2024) %>%
  rename(regime_score = "Political.regime", importer_iso3 = Code) %>%
  mutate(
    regime_scaled = regime_score / max(regime_score, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

regime_2024 %>%
  write.csv(here::here("data", "02_processed", "regimes_2024.csv"))

w_power <- 0.7
w_prox <- 0.3

stakes_with_ability <- stakes %>%
  left_join(naval_power_iso, by = "importer_iso3") %>%
  left_join(proximity, by = c("importer_iso3", "canal")) %>%
  mutate(
    proximity_score = if_else(is.na(proximity_score), 0.0, proximity_score),
    ability_score = w_prox * proximity_score + naval_norm * w_power
  )

stakes_ability_regime <- stakes_with_ability %>%
  left_join(regime_2024, by = "importer_iso3")

# write_csv(here::here("data", "03_final", "Single_Scores.csv"))

Propensity_React <- stakes_ability_regime %>%
  mutate(
    RP_ic = Stakes_ic * ability_score
  ) %>%
  select(importer_iso3, canal, RP_ic) %>%
  drop_na()

write_csv(
  Propensity_React,
  here::here("data", "03_final", "Propensity_to_React_index.csv")
)
```





# Session Info

```{r}
#| label: session-info
session_info()
```


# Computation Time

```{r}
#| label: computation-time
end_time <- Sys.time()

computation_time <- end_time - start_time

message(paste(
  "Computation completed in:",
  round(as.numeric(computation_time, units = "secs"), 2),
  "seconds.
"
))
rm(end_time, start_time)
```
